prompt: A cinematic, photorealistic reimagining of the Last Supper as a modern anachronistic selfie scene inside a dim ancient stone room. Show Jesus seated at the center front of a long rustic wooden table, wearing dark earth-toned biblical robes, extending one arm toward the camera and holding a modern black smartphone to take a group selfie. Surround him with exactly 12 disciples crowded closely around the table, making 13 people total, all dressed in simple first-century robes in beige, brown, taupe, muted blue, and cream. The composition should feel intimate and slightly humorous but still believable, with everyone leaning inward toward the phone as if posing for the photo. Use warm candlelight and soft firelit illumination, with several visible candles on the table and wall niches, creating amber highlights, deep shadows, and a sacred old-world atmosphere. Include rustic pottery, clay cups, wooden bowls, torn flatbread, and simple food on the table. The background should feature rough plastered stone walls, hanging cloth drapes, wooden pegs, and sparse historical decor. Frame it as a medium-wide group portrait from the phone camera’s point of view, with shallow depth of field, cinematic realism, detailed fabric textures, natural skin tones, and a rich warm brown color palette.
